creator: mark@grondar.za
text:
When I change to /usr/src/release, and type "make" (on a slightly hacked
makefile to avoid "cvs co"'s), the only two tarballs made in R/ftp/des and
R/cdrom/dists/des are

total 386
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel     512 May 28 13:46 ./
drwxr-xr-x  11 root  wheel     512 May 28 13:46 ../
-rw-r--r--   3 root  wheel  144754 May 28 13:02 des.aa
-rw-r--r--   3 root  wheel  227877 May 28 13:11 sebones.aa

des.aa only contains the crypt/des stuff, and sebones.aa only contains eBones
source.

Fix: 

Not yet known.
How-To-Repeat: 
cd src/release
cp Makefile makefile
vi makefile                   <hack out "cvs co"'s, replace with "cp -Rp">
make release CHROOTDIR=/bfd   <wait +- 20 hours>
cd /bfd/R/ftp/des
